title: sarar #8323
definition:
1) to be or act as prince, rule, contend, have power, prevail over,
    reign, govern
    1a) (Qal) to rule over, govern
    1b) (Hithpael) to lord it over
nasbUsage:

    reign, govern
    1a) (Qal) to rule over, govern
    1b) (Hithpael) to lord it over

    NASB:  to be or act as prince, rule
